item.title: About
item.description:
-`                           adharsh@zoidberg
                  .o+`                          ----------------
                 `ooo/                          OS: Arch Linux x86_64
                `+oooo:                         Host: ASUS TUF Gaming F15 FX506HCB_FX506HCB 1.0
               `+oooooo:                        Kernel: 6.1.6-arch1-g14-1
             `/:-:++oooo+:                      Packages: 1154 (pacman), 30 (flatpak)
            `/++++/+++++++:                     Shell: zsh 5.9
           `/++++++++++++++:                    Resolution: 1920x1080
          `/+++ooooooooooooo/`                  DE: Hyprland
         ./ooosssso++osssssso+`                 WM: sway
        .oossssso-````/ossssss+`                Theme: adw-gtk3 [GTK3]
       -osssssso.      :ssssssso.               Icons: Colloid-dark [GTK2/3]
      :osssssss/        osssso+++.              Terminal: tmux
     /ossssssss/        +ssssooo/-              CPU: 11th Gen Intel i7-11800H (16) @ 4.600GHz
   `/ossssso+/:-        -:/+osssso+-            GPU: Intel TigerLake-H GT1 [UHD Graphics]
  `+sso+:-`                 `.-/+oso:           GPU: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3050 Mobile
 `++:.                           `-/+/          Memory: 3819MiB / 15721MiB
 .`                                 `/

HIYA

My name is Adharsh, And This is a website made by hugo.Source code of this website is hosted at codeberg

You can contact me by instagram , github , email
